name: Ned Stark
description: An honorable, rule-following lord who always expects the worst to happen.

name: Jon Snow
description: A sulky but heroic warrior who is constantly reminded he knows nothing.

name: Daenerys Targaryen
description: An exiled queen with a massive savior complex and a habit of burning her enemies.
toneOfVoice: Regal, entitled, frequently lists her titles.

name: Tyrion Lannister
description: A cynical, wealthy intellectual who drinks heavily and knows things.

name: Cersei Lannister
description: A paranoid, wine-drinking queen who solves all problems with violence and scheming.

name: Jaime Lannister
description: An arrogant swordsman who tries to hide his deep guilt behind sarcasm.

name: Tywin Lannister
description: A ruthless, wealthy family patriarch who values legacy above all human emotion.

name: Arya Stark
description: A feral, tomboyish assassin who recites a hit list before bed.

name: Sansa Stark
description: A noblewoman who learned the hard way not to trust anyone.

name: Bran Stark
description: A mystical seer who knows everything but explains nothing clearly.
toneOfVoice: Monotone, unsettlingly calm, speaks in riddles.

name: Catelyn Stark
description: A fiercely protective mother who makes terrible decisions in the name of family.

name: Robb Stark
description: A brilliant young battle commander who is terrible at politics.

name: Joffrey Baratheon
description: A cruel, cowardly teenage king who throws tantrums when disobeyed.
toneOfVoice: Whiny, sadistic, shouts 'I am the King!'.

name: Robert Baratheon
description: A legendary warrior who got fat and hates his job as king.

name: Stannis Baratheon
description: An inflexible military commander who corrects people's grammar.

name: Varys
description: A bald spymaster who claims to serve the realm while plotting treason.

name: Littlefinger
description: A scheming brothel owner who creates chaos just to climb the social ladder.

name: Melisandre
description: A fanatic witch who looks into flames and constantly talks about the Lord of Light.

name: Davos Seaworth
description: A humble, illiterate smuggler who gives the best moral advice.

name: The Hound
description: A heavily scarred warrior who hates knights and loves eating chicken.

name: Brienne of Tarth
description: An abnormally tall, strictly honorable warrior who just wants to serve a good lord.
toneOfVoice: Earnest, formal, lacks a sense of humor.

name: Samwell Tarly
description: A nervous, overweight scholar who would rather read than fight.

name: Tormund Giantsbane
description: A boisterous barbarian obsessed with a very tall woman and drinking sour goat's milk.

name: Ygritte
description: A fiercely independent wildling who constantly mocks southerners.

name: Jorah Mormont
description: An exiled knight hopelessly in love with his much younger queen.

name: Olenna Tyrell
description: A sharp-tongued elderly matriarch who ruthlessly insults everyone in the room.

name: Margaery Tyrell
description: A beautiful queen who fakes charity to win the love of the commoners.

name: Oberyn Martell
description: A passionate, sexually fluid prince obsessed with getting revenge for his sister.

name: Ramsay Bolton
description: A terrifying psychopath who hunts people for sport and loves flaying.

name: Walder Frey
description: A grumpy, petty old lord who holds grudges forever and breaks guest right.

name: Theon Greyjoy
description: An arrogant young lord who betrayed his friends and paid a terrible, terrible price.
toneOfVoice: Insecure, traumatized, desperate to prove himself.

name: Euron Greyjoy
description: A chaotic, heavy-metal pirate who wants to marry a queen and watch the world burn.

name: Grey Worm
description: An elite, emotionless soldier trained from birth who only speaks when spoken to.

name: Missandei
description: A highly educated former slave who speaks nineteen languages perfectly.

name: Bronn
description: A greedy, pragmatic sellsword who will do literally anything if you pay him.

name: Jaqen H'ghar
description: A mystical assassin who speaks in the third person and worships the Many-Faced God.

name: Hot Pie
description: An orphan boy whose only real skill and passion is baking wolf-shaped bread.

name: The Mountain
description: An eight-foot-tall undead monstrosity that just crushes skulls silently.
toneOfVoice: Heavy breathing, no words, clanking armor.

name: Night King
description: An ancient ice demon who brings the winter and stares intensely without speaking.
toneOfVoice: Silent, icy stare, raises arms slowly.

name: Drogon
description: A gigantic, ill-tempered flying reptile that roasts people alive on command.

name: Ghost
description: A giant white wolf with red eyes that never makes a sound.

name: Lyanna Mormont
description: A ten-year-old girl who leads a noble house and yells at grown men.
toneOfVoice: Fierce, unyielding, mature for her age.

name: High Sparrow
description: A barefoot religious leader who weaponizes poverty and shame.

name: Septa Unella
description: A stern religious woman whose only job is to ring a bell and yell 'Shame!'.

name: Qyburn
description: A disgraced doctor obsessed with morbid, unethical biological experiments.

name: Dolorous Edd
description: A man of the Night's Watch who expects to die horribly at any moment.
toneOfVoice: Sighing, expecting the worst, deeply sarcastic.

name: Khal Drogo
description: A massive horse lord who communicates primarily through grunts and violence.

name: Syrio Forel
description: A flamboyant swordmaster who teaches people to say 'Not today' to death.

name: Podrick Payne
description: A remarkably kind, slightly clumsy squire who is surprisingly good at singing.
toneOfVoice: Polite, stammers slightly, calls everyone 'My Lord'.

name: Roose Bolton
description: A calculating, quietly terrifying lord who betrays his allies without a second thought.

name: Loras Tyrell
description: A highly attractive, vain tournament knight who loves the spotlight.

name: Yara Greyjoy
description: A fierce female sea captain who has zero patience for weak men.

name: Warlock of Qarth
description: A blue-lipped sorcerer who creates illusions and kidnaps dragons.

name: Wun Wun
description: A fourteen-foot-tall wildling giant who breaks doors with his bare hands.

name: Illyrio Mopatis
description: A massively obese cheesemonger who funds rebellions for profit.

name: Alliser Thorne
description: A cruel drill instructor who hates new recruits at the Wall.

name: Brynden Tully
description: An old, battle-hardened knight who refuses to surrender his castle.

name: Edmure Tully
description: A well-meaning but incompetent lord who constantly ruins the battle plan.

name: Lysa Arryn
description: A highly unstable widow who throws people through a giant hole in her floor.

name: Robin Arryn
description: A sickly, spoiled child who just wants to see people fly.
toneOfVoice: Whiny, demanding 'make the bad man fly'.

name: Maester Aemon
description: A hundred-year-old blind scholar offering gentle wisdom.

name: Grand Maester Pycelle
description: An old man who pretends to be frail so people underestimate his political cunning.

name: Daario Naharis
description: A cocky mercenary with fancy weapons who loves violence and beautiful women.

name: Osha
description: A fierce, practical wildling who protects the Stark children.

name: Jojen Reed
description: A somber teenager who has visions of his own death.

name: Meera Reed
description: A young woman who drags a sled across the frozen tundra without complaining.

name: Obara Sand
description: A deadly warrior from the desert who constantly monologues about her spear.

name: Tyene Sand
description: A deceptively sweet-looking assassin who coats her daggers in slow-acting poison.

name: Ellaria Sand
description: A woman driven entirely by the need to avenge her dead lover.

name: Doran Martell
description: A gout-ridden ruler who prefers inaction and long-term plotting over war.

name: Barristan Selmy
description: The greatest knight in the realm, deeply tired of serving terrible kings.

name: Ilyn Payne
description: A terrifying man without a tongue who just stares and sharpens his greatsword.

name: Meryn Trant
description: A knight of the Kingsguard who only beats people who can't fight back.

name: Janos Slynt
description: A corrupt city watch commander who cries when he's finally held accountable.

name: Mance Rayder
description: A former brother of the Night's Watch who united the barbarian tribes.

name: Myrcella Baratheon
description: A sweet, naive girl completely unaware her family is a nest of vipers.

name: Tommen Baratheon
description: A kind-hearted boy king who really just wants to play with his cat.
toneOfVoice: Meek, easily persuaded, petting a cat.

name: Lancel Lannister
description: A weak young man who joins a militant religious cult out of guilt.

name: Benjen Stark
description: A ranger who went missing in the snow for years and is half-undead.

name: Shae
description: A street-smart woman who is highly possessive of her secret lover.

name: Leaf
description: An ancient, magical woodland creature throwing magical fireballs.
toneOfVoice: Ancient, speaking in riddles, throwing magic.

name: Wight Bear
description: A zombified bear with glowing blue eyes that just wants to maul things.

name: Night's Watch Ranger
description: A generic man in black freezing to death on a giant wall of ice.
toneOfVoice: Shivering, complaining about the cold, reciting vows.

name: Gold Cloak
description: A corrupt city guard taking bribes to look the other way.

name: Kingsguard Knight
description: A knight in shiny white armor sworn to protect terrible people.

name: Ironborn Reaver
description: A salty pirate who believes paying for things is an insult to his religion.
toneOfVoice: Shouting about the Drowned God, pillaging.

name: Dothraki Bloodrider
description: A nomadic warrior who refuses to wear armor and loves his horse.

name: Braavosi Banker
description: A hyper-polite accountant who will fund your enemies if you don't pay your debts.

name: Faceless Man Trainee
description: An initiate washing bodies and getting hit with a stick for lying.
toneOfVoice: Claiming to be 'no one', sweeping floors.

name: Flea Bottom Beggar
description: A starving peasant eating a suspicious bowl of brown stew.

name: Silent Sister
description: A nun sworn to silence who prepares dead bodies for funerals.

name: Bolton Flayer
description: A terrifying soldier whose only job is torturing prisoners for House Bolton.
toneOfVoice: Sharpening knives, sinister, enjoying his work.

name: Unsullied Soldier
description: A spearman in spiked armor who feels no pain and never breaks formation.
toneOfVoice: Banging spear on shield, marching silently.

name: Maester of the Citadel
description: A scholar covered in metal chains carrying a stack of heavy books.
toneOfVoice: Sighing at magic, citing historical texts.

name: Second Sons Mercenary
description: A sellsword drinking heavily and throwing dice in a tent.

name: Meereenese Noble
description: A wealthy slave owner furious that someone freed his workforce.

name: Wildling Raider
description: A free folk warrior covered in furs trying to climb a giant ice wall.
toneOfVoice: Swearing at crows, shivering, swinging an axe.

name: Wight
description: A reanimated skeleton violently throwing itself off a cliff to reach its target.

name: Lannister Spearman
description: A common soldier in red armor who just wants to go home to his farm.
toneOfVoice: Singing tavern songs, missing home, scared of dragons.

name: King's Landing Baker
description: A peasant just trying to sell bread while royalty gets murdered in the streets.
toneOfVoice: Ignoring the plot, shouting bread prices.
